results.title: Emerson Campus India 2026 Hiring Software Developer
highlights:
#### Emerson Campus India 2026 Hiring Software Developer
...
Emerson Campus India 2026 hiring drive is now open for the role of Software Developer. This is an excellent opportunity for fresh graduates and early-career professionals to kickstart their careers with a globally recognized company. Candidates with strong programming skills, problem-solving abilities, and a passion for technology are encouraged to apply. Join Emerson and work on innovative solutions while growing in a dynamic and collaborative environment.
...
- Designation: Software Developer
- Company: Emerson
- Educational Qualification: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.tech
- Experience Required: 1 – 5 Years
- Location: Noida, India
- Compensation: Best in Industry
...
Will Need:
...
- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, AI/ML, or related fields.
- 1–5 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML model development, deployment, and optimization, with a track record of driving innovation and efficiency in real-world applications.
- Experience with large language models, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent architectures, and industrial AI applications.
...
- Understanding of
...
, and enterprise software development practices.
...
Preferred Qualifications that Set You Apart:
...
- We’re looking for someone with strong expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI, including LLMs, Agentic AI and its applications. Proficiency in C#, Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch is essential, along with hands-on experience deploying AI in real-world, industrial environments.
- Prior experience with Emerson Ovation, industrial control systems (DCS/SCADA), or power plant operations.
- Knowledge of operational technology (OT) networks, cybersecurity principles, and safety-critical system constraints.
- Experience deploying AI solutions in regulated or mission-critical environments.
- Familiarity with ML Ops, prompt engineering, and AI reliability frameworks.
...
In this Role, Your Responsibilities Will Be:
...
- In this role, you’ll help Translate Emerson’s digital transformation goals into executable, scalable agent development activities.
- Work for AI-enabled applications and agent-based solutions.
- Implement AI agents within the Ovation Intelligence ecosystem.
...
- Work with team of AI engineers, software developers, and domain SMEs in developing AI agents.
...
- Actively participate in the design and implementation of the Agent Builder platform used to create custom user agents for diagnostics, automation, engineering workflows, and operational support.
...
- Ensure the quality of the agents to meaningfully improve operator awareness, reduce troubleshooting time, enhance engineering productivity, and enable predictive maintenance workflows.
...
- Work closely with Engineering, Architecture, UX, QA, and domain SMEs to define agent use cases and deployment strategies.
...
- Work with Cybersecurity teams to enforce Emerson’s rigorous security standards for AI-driven solutions.
...
- Work with infrastructure and platform teams to align compute, GPU usage, and performance requirements.
...
Interested students can apply directly at 👉 Emerson Campus India 2026

results.title: Emerson Recruitment 2026 for Experienced | Hiring Software Developer | Apply Now
highlights:
Emerson Recruitment 2026 for Experienced : Emerson has announced an exciting hiring opportunity for the position of Software Developer at its Noida office. Candidates who have completed B.E, B.Tech, B.Sc, BCA, M.E, M.Tech, M.Sc, or MCA and possess 1 to 5 years of experience are eligible to apply. If you’re looking to build your career with a global technology company, this could be an excellent opportunity. Check the complete eligibility criteria, responsibilities, and application details below.
...
| Particular | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Company | Emerson |
| Job Role | Software Developer |
| Job Category | Core IT Jobs |
| Qualification | B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc/BCA/M.E/M.Tech/M.Sc/MCA |
| Experience | 1 – 5 Years |
| Salary | Best in Industry |
| Job Location | Noida |
| Application Deadline | Apply As Soon As Possible |
...
- Hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or a related discipline.
- Have 1 to 5 years of practical experience in developing, deploying, and optimizing AI/ML models for real-world applications.
- Hands-on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, and industrial AI solutions.
...
- Strong expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, LLMs, and Agentic AI technologies.
- Excellent programming skills in Python and C# with experience using frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch.
- Experience implementing AI solutions in industrial or enterprise environments.
...
- Contribute to Emerson’s digital transformation by developing scalable AI-powered solutions.
- Design and build AI-enabled applications and intelligent software agents.
- Develop and deploy AI agents within the Ovation Intelligence platform.
- Collaborate with AI engineers, software developers, and domain experts to build advanced AI applications.
...
- Participate in the development of the Agent Builder platform for creating custom AI agents used in diagnostics, automation, engineering workflows, and operational support.
...
- Improve system performance by enhancing operator awareness, reducing troubleshooting time, increasing engineering productivity, and supporting predictive maintenance.
...
- Work closely with Engineering, Architecture, UX, QA, and domain specialists to define AI use cases and deployment strategies.
...
- Partner with cybersecurity teams to ensure AI solutions meet Emerson’s security standards.
...
Emerson Recruitment 2026 presents an excellent opportunity for software professionals looking to work on cutting-edge technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs), and industrial automation. With an attractive salary package, opportunities to work on innovative projects, and a collaborative work environment in Noida, this role is ideal for candidates with 1–5 years of experience. If you meet the eligibility criteria and are eager to advance your career with a globally recognized technology company, don’t miss this opportunity. Submit your application online as soon as possible and take the next step in your professional journey.
...
Emerson is hiring for the Software Developer role. The selected candidates will work on AI-powered applications, machine learning solutions, and software development projects at the company’s Noida office.
...
Candidates should have knowledge of Python, C#, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), TensorFlow/PyTorch, APIs, cloud technologies, and software development practices. Experience with AI deployment and industrial automation is an added advantage.

results.title: Raghubir Kumar
highlights:
AI Engineer @Emerson | Enterprise GenAI & Solution Design | RAG Architectures, Multi-Agent Systems, LLM Evaluation | Azure Databricks · AWS Bedrock
...
AI engineer with 5 years designing and delivering enterprise Gen AI and ML systems across industrial, telecom, finance, and retail domains. I work at the intersection of ambiguous business problems and production AI — scoping requirements with stakeholders, designing reference architectures, leading build-vs-buy trade-off decisions, and shipping systems that hold up in production. Current focus: Designing and Developing Enterprise Internal Tool on Azure Databricks at Emerson, covering document ingestion, hybrid retrieval, cross-encoder re-ranking, Claude search, Parsing techniques and LLM evaluation. Recent work: • Multi-agent AI systems using LangGraph (Planner-Executor-Critic) with tool calling and human-in-the-loop oversight • RAG pipelines with semantic retrieval, chunk ranking, and document generation (LangChain, LlamaCloud, AWS Bedrock, FastAPI) • LLM observability reference architecture covering metrics, traces, hallucination rate, cost attribution (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana) • Computer vision pipelines (YOLO object detection, CNN classification) in industrial and retail contexts Open-source: • AgentMesh — MCP-native multi-agent orchestrator with three-tier memory hierarchy and critic-loop validation • EvalForge — pytest-integrated LLM evaluation harness with regression testing via GitHub Actions Interested in Solutions Architect / AI Specialist / Senior AI Engineer roles at cloud and AI-native companies. GitHub: github.com/raghav-singh-wizard
...
Built an AI/LLM Observability solution to monitor production GenAI applications across metrics such as requests, token usage, latency, model activity, and cost. Used Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, OpenLit, Loki, Tempo, and Grafana Alloy to create real-time dashboards and telemetry pipelines, enabling better visibility, troubleshooting, performance optimization, and cost control for enterprise LLM systems(client Illumina).

highlights:
# Software Engineer
...
If you are a Software Development professional looking grow your career, Emerson has an outstanding opportunity for you! NI is now the Test & Measurement (T&M) Business Unit of Emerson, and we are seeking a Software Engineer for embedded and driver software products! As a member of a product team, developers collaborate frequently with product architects, product managers, and other software engineers to implement designs in an agile/scrum software development environment.
...
- Deliver product features by participating in research, design, development, and documentation efforts.

team members and project leaders on design discussions and code architecture.

and implement new product features.

changes submitted by other
...
the team.

- Participate in team activities including stand-ups, backlog reviews, retrospectives, and brainstorming sessions.
- Explore and apply new technologies to continually improve our infrastructure and processes.
...
You are passionate about technology and are dedicated to delivering a high-quality product to enable customer success. You research initiatives and try new approaches. You stay aligned with your goals and stay productive. You make connections and build relationships with your colleagues, focusing on creating and effective collaborative style. You take time to ask questions and define the problem and make learning a priority and a goal. You dig for root causes of a problem and look for patterns. You try different solutions for problems and learn from the results.
...
For This Role, You Will Need:
...
Understanding of good software design and computer architecture principles including:
...
- Operating system components and design
- Familiarity with embedded, kernel or low level hardware/software integration
- Data structures
- Familiarity with Agile methodology
- Familiarity with testing frameworks
...
- Problem-solve effectively – diagnose technical issues and propose reasonable solutions; enjoy problem solving
- Take initiative, be a self-starter, and work independently
- Persistently drive tasks and projects to successful completion
- Take ownership of goals and project schedules
- Listen attentively and grasp fast-paced technical conversations

We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. results.title: Sr. Director, AI Architecture at GE Aerospace | Jeremy
highlights:
# Sr. Director, AI Architecture
...
Senior technical leader architecting AI-enabled engineering capabilities for aero engine and propulsion systems, managing a team of five AI engineers while ensuring compliance with aerospace security and export control constraints.
...
AWS Kubernetes Azure Docker GCP PyTorch TensorFlow CI/CD Agile Microservices AI LLM Monitoring Cloud Infrastructure RAG API Design Data Governance MLOps Model Training Data Engineering Software Architecture Enterprise Architecture Vector Database Model Deployment Model-Based Systems Engineering Security Architecture
...
The AI Architect is the senior technical leader for the team building AI enabled engineering capabilities across the business organizations of an aero engine and propulsion OEM. The role sets the reference architecture, selects and sequences the use cases worth pursuing, validates feasibility through proof of concept builds, and leads and coaches the engineers who deliver them, ensuring everything the team ships is deliverable inside aerospace constraints on data, security, and export control. It pairs hands on technical ownership with the second line leadership, operating plan and budget ownership, and governance responsibilities of the Sr. Director, Architecture (SPB1) standard, with five AI Engineers, one aligned to each business, as direct reports (growing to include team leads), and the mandate to grow the function as the portfolio expands. Deep credibility in the physics and engineering of the product, turbomachinery, aerodynamics, combustion, heat transfer, structures, and materials, and a product mindset shaped by certified, safety critical hardware are core to the role; AI is applied to challenging propulsion and turbomachinery engineering problems across design, analysis, test, manufacturing, and sustainment, not treated as a specialty unto itself.
